email_samples.subject: EMAILED DAN PERRY RATES FOR SUMMER -
email_samples.description: SHOT HIM THIS:   Hi Dan,            I wanted to see if you may be able to assist or point me in the right direction as GMH is looking to get back involved out of Nestle?s ME facilities.             We were active since around April of 2018 and serviced throughout the summer into November of 2018. Tony Grasruck was my previous contact up there but looks learned he has moved to another organization.             We?re an asset-based carrier headquartered in VT and had spot equipment on site in Poland and Hollis Center. Our rates eventually became un competitive due to a large drop in volume of out those facilities, however we?ve had some network changes and are looking for an opportunity to provide rates as we have regular capacity and there are certain geographic regions where we could be very competitive, such as VT and Albany NY area.   Have a great day!

email_samples.subject: Initial Email to Martin
email_samples.description: Sent Martin this:    Hi Martin,          I?m looking to learn more about your transportation procurement process, specifically for the Hazleton, PA facility.           GMH Trans is an asset-based carrier (90 trucks, 240+trailers) headquartered in New-England landing our assets near Hazleton 10-15x weekly for a customer of ours.           Certainly interested in exploring further as there may be synergies in our networks if you have freight moving into New-England.   Have a great day!

email_samples.subject: 2019 Email to Tom Bruno
email_samples.description: Sent him this email:   Hi Tom,           Looking to learn more about your transportation procurement process, specifically for your E. Greenville, PA facility.             GMH Trans is an asset-based carrier (95 trucks ? 240+ trailers) headquartered in VT servicing dry-van and temperature-controlled freight.             We have a strong asset presence near your E. Greenville facility as we deliver nearby 10-15x weekly.             Would certainly be interested in exploring further to see if we may be able to uncover any opportunities or earn inclusion in your sourcing events.

email_samples.subject: 2019 Email to Joe
email_samples.description: Hi Joseph,        I?m looking to learn more about your transportation procurement process.         GMH Trans is an asset-based carrier (90 trucks 240+ trailers) headquartered in VT with an asset-presence near your Laflin facility.          We?re delivering roughly 10-15x weekly into a customer of ours.           Would certainly be interested in exploring further to see if we may be able to uncover any opportunities or earn inclusion in your sourcing events.   Have a great day!

email_samples.subject: Initial Email to Todd
email_samples.description: Wasn't sure if email format worked as prior contact Don Williams who said was logistics was not an actual person anymore there -  Prompt system so wasn't able to reach on phone -   Sent this to TODD next time I should call up there and get SOMEONE to tell me who handles logistics.    Hi Todd,           I?m looking to learn more about your transportation procurement process.             GMH Trans is an asset-based carrier headquartered in VT with 90 drivers and 240+ trailers              We?re experienced in servicing shipments containing alcohol and throughout New-England and the Mid-Atlantic and have permits where required.              Would certainly be interested to learn more about your requirements to see if we may be able to identify any synergies in our networks.   Have a great day!

email_samples.description: Hi Ken,          I?m looking to see if there may be an opportunity to learn more about your transportation procurement process?           GMH Trans is an asset-based carrier (90 trucks, 240+ trailers)  headquartered in VT with a heavy presence near your Granville facility.          We service the US east of the Mississippi as well as Quebec and are capable of providing drop trailers at origin or destination when required.            Certainly interested in learning more about your carrier requirements to see if we may be able to identify any synergies in our networks.   Have a great day!

email_samples.subject: Initial Voicemail and email to Fred
email_samples.description: Called the yard office and the guy said he wasn't sure who handled logistics, etc...   The main office# had a promty #3 for Purchasing / Trucking - Left a message on "Freds" voicemail there then sent the following email:   Hi Fred,            I wanted to open another line of communication and see if there may be an opportunity to learn more about your transportation procurement process?            GMH Trans is an asset-based carrier headquartered in VT operating roll-tites and dry van equipment.              We service the US east of the Mississippi and Quebec and have a heavy asset-concentration near your Kingston, NH facility and do have assets near your VA location as well.              Would certainly be interested to learn more about your requirements to see if we may be able to identify any synergies in our networks.   Have a great day!

email_samples.subject: 2019 Voicemail to Rob - and EMAIL
email_samples.description: Called and left Rob a voicemail... Then went ahead and sent him this email:    Hi Rob,         Was looking to see if there?s an opportunity to learn more about your transportation procurement process?               GMH is an asset-based carrier (90 trucks, 240+trailers) headquartered in VT servicing both dry van and temperature-controlled freight.           We service the US,  east of the Mississippi and Quebec on GMH assets.            I?d certainly be interested in learning more about your carrier requirements to see if we can identify any areas of opportunity in our networks. At a minimum, we?d love the opportunity to get set up and used as a backup in an emergency.   Have a great day!

email_samples.subject: Initial Call / Email to Bob Williams
email_samples.description: Regular phone #'s were not working so used their contact us on the website to Get Bob's info as well as email. Left him voicemail and then emailed him.  In searching on Google appears he may be an owner, definitely a decision maker though regardless.   SENT THIS:   Hi Bob,          Wondering if you may be able to help point me in the right direction to learn more about your transportation procurement process?            GMH is an asset-based carrier headquartered in VT who operated Roll-Tites as well as 53? vans servicing the US east of the Mississippi and Quebec.           Would certainly be interested to learn more about your transportation procurement process to see if we may be able to identify any synergies in our networks.           Have a great day!

email_samples.subject: 2019 - Call and Email to Kelly
email_samples.description: Called and Spoke with Kelly who replaced Todd - they don't do much with Plasan anymore out of MI.  Said all their outbound are customer routed from Bennington to Emporia, VA (Couldn't find any defense companies down that way unfortunately. to try and call on them.).   Sent her this email to open a line of Communication with our contact info on it.    Hi Kelly,          Glad we could connect earlier. Like I mentioned, GMH Trans is an asset-based carrier and we service full truckload, dry, temp controlled, and Roll Tite loads.            We service the US east of the Mississippi and Quebec. Certainly let me know if you have any needs that pop up whether inbound or outbound and we?ll see if there?s an opportunity to align.   Have a great day!

email_samples.subject: Initial Voicemail  / Email to Steve
email_samples.description: Left Steve a good voicemail - followed up with this email, which I apparently had from an appointment or something we had into there in the past:   SENT:  Hi Steve,            Wanted to open another line of communication as Rich King one of our drivers passed along your information. Sounds like you two had talked about our presence in the region and potential interest in aligning that capacity.              We?re an asset-based carrier headquartered in VT and service the US east of the Mississippi and Quebec.               We have assets landing regularly near your facility and would certainly be interested in exploring your network further to see if we can identify any synergies.   Have a great day!

email_samples.description: Called and tried to get an operator to provide me with some info on WHO to talk to specifically, but coulnd't get to one.   Called and left a mailbox on their general "shipping" mailbox....   Keep after as there is opportunity here!

We service the US east of the Mississippi and Quebec and are certainly interested in learning more about your carrier requirements to see if we may be able to identify any synergies within our network. email_samples.subject: 2nd email to Jason Van Buren
email_samples.description: Hi Jason,           I?m looking to learn more about your transportation procurement process.            GMH Trans is an asset-based carrier headquartered in VT (95 trucks 240+ trailers) with daily asset capacity near your Malta and Essex Junction facilities.             I?d certainly be interested in learning more about your process and requirements to see if we can earn an opportunity for inclusion in your next review of transportation operations. email_samples.subject: Initial Voicemail / Email
email_samples.description: Left him a voicemail at his special # and sent him the following email:    Hi Peter,          I?m looking to learn more about your transportation procurement process.           GMH Trans is an asset-based carrier (90 trucks, 240+ trailers)  headquartered in New-England.           We?re landing our assets daily in Holland, MI and the greater Baltimore, MD area looking to move into the Mid-Atlantic & New England.           I?d certainly be interested in learning more about your carrier vetting process to see if we can identify any synergies and earn inclusion in your sourcing events.   Have a great day!

email_samples.subject: Initial Call, voicemail / email to Chris Bair
email_samples.description: Hi Chris,           I?m looking to learn more about your transportation procurement process.            GMH Trans is an asset-based carrier, (100 trucks, 240+ trailers) headquartered in New-England.            We have assets landing 10-15x weekly in Grand Rapids, and similar capacity near multiple PA and MA facilities.             Certainly interested to see if there may be an opportunity to earn inclusion in your sourcing events to see if we can identify synergies.   Have a great day!

email_samples.subject: Call to Tara, chat then email
email_samples.description: Hi Tara,         Glad we could connect today. While we are not a full service 3PL regarding Full truckload, LTL, and payment factoring our company may have changed since you last used us and can update some of that info below for you to share with your team as they review options.           We now operate 90 trucks, 240 trailers, and have roughly 20,000 sq ft of warehouse space at our headquarters in Westminster, VT only 20 miles from your facility.  I certainly think we can offer some advantages on inbound moves to your facility in terms of willingness to provide drop trailers and we?re always looking for opportunities to get back into the Brattleboro area. We have daily asset-capacity throughout MA, NJ, PA, and OH looking to get back into VT if you have inbound vendors in those regions.           Regarding outbound freight we service primarily east of the Mississippi and again are capable of providing drop equipment if that?s seen as a convenience and volume supports. We have multiple customer partners with whom we service 10-20+ loads weekly for and can effectively handle volumes of that level.            While we may not be a one stop shop for all your modes, working directly together may provide the opportunity for some cost savings.   Let me know if there?s anything additional I can provide.   Have a great day!

email_samples.subject: Voicemail and Email to Scott
email_samples.description: Left him a voicemail - then sent this email:   Hi Scott,          I?m looking to learn more about your transportation procurement process.            GMH Trans is an asset-based carrier (90 trucks, 240+ trailers)  headquartered in New-England.           We?re landing our assets 10-15x weekly in Holland, MI for one of our customers.           Certainly interested in exploring further to see if we may be able to identify any synergies within our networks.

email_samples.description: Called lookoing for Dan but hes not with Company -- got forwarded to Reed who replaced him. Also figured out his email too after some work.   Left message- Matt Patrick, calling from the VT headquartered Asset Based Carrier, GMH Trans  -  Sent below email:   Hi Reed,        I?m looking to learn more about your transportation procurement process for your Manchester, NH facility.         GMH Trans is an asset-based carrier (90 trucks, 240+ trailers) headquartered in nearby Westminster, VT.        We have assets landing daily in the greater Manchester region and would certainly be interested to learn more about your carrier requirements and networks to see if we can identify any synergies.   Have a great day!
